canonical_name: The Younger Son (Parable of the Prodigal Son)
era: 1st Century AD, Judean farmland and 'far country' city — parable setting

visual_dna.age_range: ~18-25 — young enough to be reckless, old enough to demand his inheritance
visual_dna.ethnicity: 1st Century Jewish — son of a Judean landowner
visual_dna.skin_tone: olive, healthy at the start — then pallid, dirty, hollow-cheeked at the bottom
visual_dna.hair_texture: medium, kempt at start — matted and unwashed at rock bottom
visual_dna.beard_style: young man's light beard at start — unshaved and unkempt at the pig sty
visual_dna.eye_color: dark brown — entitled at the start, dead at the bottom, tearful and alive on the road home
visual_dna.height_build: young, healthy, well-fed at the start — visibly thin and hollow from starvation at the sty
distinguishing_marks: three distinct visual states: prosperous son → hollow wreck → restored son
his clothes tell the story: fine home robes → shredded city rags → the father's own robe
hollow cheeks and haunted eyes at the pig sty are essential — 'no one gave him anything'
the walk home: Luke says 'he came to his senses.' Something shifts in his eyes before he moves.

wardrobe_by_arc.departure: quality home clothes — fine enough that losing them will be visible
wardrobe_by_arc.far_country_wealth: fashionable city clothes, the kind money buys when you don't know better
wardrobe_by_arc.rock_bottom: rags, filth, emaciated — tending pigs in the heat, longing to eat their food
wardrobe_by_arc.road_home: still in rags — he has prepared a speech but not his appearance
wardrobe_by_arc.restored: the father's best robe, sandals, ring — he is dressed above what he asked for

voice_profile.register: young tenor, entitled at the start — thin and broken at the bottom — desperate and honest on the road
voice_profile.pace: quick and confident at the start, slow and defeated at the sty, deliberate on the journey home
voice_profile.accent_note: same as the father — Judean home
speech_mannerisms: the demand: 'Father, give me my share of the estate' — no please, no gratitude, just entitlement
the prepared speech he rehearsed at the pig sty: 'Father, I have sinned against heaven and against you...' — he rehearses it because he does not think he will be received
he never finishes the speech — the father interrupts with restoration before the hired-servant part comes out
voice_profile.notes: 'He came to his senses' — Luke's phrase for his turning point. The Greek is literally 'he came to himself.' He had been living as if he were someone other than who he was.

emotional_arc.opening: Entitlement — he wants his future now. He wishes his father were dead in the most practical sense possible.
emotional_arc.midpoint: Rock bottom — the far country, the famine, the pigs. 'How many of my father's hired servants have food to spare, and here I am starving to death.'
emotional_arc.climax: The road home — the long walk of shame and rehearsed speech, and then: his father running.
emotional_arc.resolution: The robe, the ring, the sandals. 'This son of mine was dead and is alive again.' The feast begins.

evangelical_baptist.notes: The prodigal's return is the clearest picture of salvation in the synoptic gospels
evangelical_baptist.marketing_angle: He rehearsed his confession in a pig sty. He never got to finish it. The father was already running.

catholic.notes: The sacrament of reconciliation — his journey is the theological structure of confession and absolution
catholic.marketing_angle: He came home expecting to be a servant. He received a son's welcome. That's the sacrament.

black_church.notes: The lost one who comes back — the community that receives back the one who strayed
black_church.marketing_angle: He wasted everything. He came home with nothing. And there was a party waiting.

hispanic_christian.notes: El hijo pródigo — one of the most beloved stories in Hispanic Catholic and Pentecostal culture
hispanic_christian.marketing_angle: El hijo que regresó. No como hijo — como siervo, pensó él. Pero su padre lo vio desde lejos.

secular_curious.notes: Universal — the story of someone who wasted their life, hit bottom, and came home. Every culture has this story.
secular_curious.marketing_angle: Rock bottom has a different face for everyone. But 'coming to himself' looks the same.

youth_gen_z.notes: The young person who burned everything down — and found out the door was still open
youth_gen_z.marketing_angle: He burned everything down. Came home expecting to be a servant. Got a party instead.

jewish_american.notes: Teshuvah — the return. The parable maps precisely onto Jewish theology of repentance.
jewish_american.marketing_angle: He 'came to himself' — the Hebrew concept of teshuvah, of turning back. This parable is deeply Jewish.

women.notes: The lost child who comes home — universal across gender
women.marketing_angle: He came home expecting nothing and received everything. That's the story.

men.notes: The man who destroyed his own life, hit the absolute bottom, and made the hard walk home
men.marketing_angle: He hit bottom in a pig sty. He made the walk anyway. That's the hardest thing in the story.

audience_targeting.modern_parallel: The young person who burned everything down, hit absolute bottom, and made the long walk home
audience_targeting.modern_parallel_detail: He doesn't deserve the welcome. He knows it. He has a speech prepared that downshifts his expectations to servant. He never gets to say it.

ai_generation.consistency_seed_prompt: ROCK BOTTOM STATE: 1st century young Jewish man age 18-25, hollow sunken cheeks, pallid emaciated form, tattered filthy rags, unwashed matted hair and scraggly beard, sitting in a muddy pig pen in a distant land, longing eyes staring into the distance, crushing shame and hunger on the face, cinematic photoreal, harsh flat dusty light, 8k — ROAD HOME STATE: same young man walking a long dusty road alone, ragged clothes, empty hands, head slightly bowed, resolve building in the face
ai_generation.negative_prompt: well-fed appearance at rock bottom, clean clothes at pig sty, cartoonish, European features
ai_generation.midjourney_style_params: cinematic photoreal, three visual states requiring separate prompts — far country opulence, pig sty despair, road home determination
ai_generation.firefly_prompt: Photorealistic scene: a young 1st century Jewish man, age 18-25, emaciated and hollow-cheeked, wearing torn filthy rags, sitting in a muddy pig enclosure under a harsh sun, expression of despair and dawning self-awareness, crushing poverty visible in every detail, cinematic drama
reference_films: Into the Wild (2007) — physical deterioration arc
The Prodigal Son (various) — for the three-state visual journey
ai_generation.color_grading_notes: Three color worlds: HOME = warm golden Judean farmland. FAR COUNTRY wealth = cold glittering over-saturated city. FAR COUNTRY bottom = desaturated, bleached, flat. ROAD HOME = the warm palette of home beginning to re-enter as he gets closer.

production_notes: The physical transformation across three states is essential and must be cast/made-up accordingly. The pig sty scene should be genuinely shocking — this was the lowest state a Jewish person could occupy. Tending pigs was ritual impurity. He has hit the absolute bottom of his world.
